title: SACRAMENTO –
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: Abortion is healthcare, including emergency care.
California hospitals have a duty to provide emergency care to anyone needing stabilizing care.
Ending overly burdensome and extraneous licensure requirements can help prevent birth center closures.
Licensed birth centers have been found to improve newborn and maternal health outcomes.
California faces a crisis in access to maternity care that disproportionately affects low-income, Black, Latino, Indigenous, and rural communities.
Freestanding birth centers offer high quality, midwifery-led care and can expand access in maternity care shortage areas.
Over-the-counter birth control increases accessibility for more people.
Medi-Cal recipients face barriers to accessing over-the-counter contraceptives that private insurance holders do not.
Pharmacists are recognized as essential access points for reproductive health services and products in California.
